response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: 00:00-02:18 involves talking and announcements. 2. Identified performance starting at 02:18. 3. Used on-screen text to identify song: 'Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人'. 4. Searched for lyrics using 'Gold Unbalance feat. 中崎健人 lyrics' and found the song titled 'Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人' by Mori Calliope. 5. Extracted full Japanese lyrics. No official English translation was available.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei presenting, chatting, and performing 'Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人' (feat. Kento Nakajima). The video includes behind-the-scenes interactions and promotional announcements for merchandise.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei talk to the camera, presenting a voting poll for the upcoming members-only stream and making announcements.
Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei perform 'Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人'.
scenes.song_title: Gold Unbalance feat. 中島健人
